title: Naukri.com is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Naukri.com is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Naukri.com in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Naukri.com:
Naukri.com is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri.com!
